title: Text-mergeable task file schema
description: Implement SPEC section 5 (schema invariant): serialize task files so git text merge is clean on disjoint-field edits, and split notes out to a sibling <id>.notes.jsonl append-only file. Keys sorted, one field per line, trailing newline, stable ordering. Unit tests for roundtrip. Fixture tests that do real git merges on two divergent branches (disjoint fields -> clean; concurrent notes append -> clean). No topology changes yet; task files still live in main. Reference: docs/SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md.
